courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: 48-Hour Scope Game
genericDescription: Scope aggressively; prioritize a playable core; separate must-have from nice-to-have.
specificDescription: Build a complete game in 48 hours using a written feature lock after hour 8. Submit the feature lock, final build, and a list of cut features with reasons.
gradingRubric: 30 pts scope discipline; 20 pts playable completion; 20 pts feature prioritization; 15 pts build stability; 15 pts retrospective.
